input_preview:
claim: NVIDIA and Google are leading 800 VDC adoption ahead of schedule, with small-volume shipments starting around Q3 2026; Vertiv and Delta are relevant suppliers.
evidence_span: Vertiv says its 800 VDC power portfolio is planned for release in the second half of 2026 to support NVIDIA Rubin Ultra platforms.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: vertiv.com
source_url: https://www.vertiv.com/en-us/about/news-and-events/corporate-news/from-vision-to-readiness-vertiv-collaborates-with-nvidia-to-advance-800-vdc-platform-designs-to-power-the-next-generation-of-ai-factories/

claim: A seven-stock European photonics basket maps to CPO, InP lasers, silicon photonics, glass processing, and AI data-center optical interconnect themes; the stock basket itself is implied to be investable.
evidence_span: Sivers says its laser arrays will be integrated into GlobalFoundries silicon-photonics reference designs for CPO, LPO, and other data-center interconnect architectures.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: sivers-semiconductors.com
source_url: https://www.sivers-semiconductors.com/press/sivers-globalfoundries-advance-ai-data-center-optical-solutions/

claim: Marvell frames next-generation AI infrastructure performance around compute, memory, and especially connectivity; MRVL/Marvell official material supports connectivity as a core AI-infra bottleneck.
evidence_span: Marvell says AI scaling depends on how efficiently data moves across accelerators, servers, racks, campuses, and geographically distributed data centers.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: investor.marvell.com
source_url: https://investor.marvell.com/news-events/press-releases/detail/1022/marvell-keynote-at-computex-2026-the-future-of-aiscaling-depends-on-connectivity

claim: Roundhill launched DRAM as a pure memory ETF in April 2026, bundling memory names such as Micron, SK hynix, Samsung, SanDisk, Western Digital, and Seagate; social posts also cite large YTD gains.
evidence_span: Roundhill states DRAM began trading on April 2, 2026 and is a memory-focused ETF.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: roundhillinvestments.com
source_url: https://www.roundhillinvestments.com/etf/dram/

claim: AI compute hardware bottlenecks are moving into low-loss materials, orthogonal backplanes, glass substrates, and CPO; this creates a structural investment window.
evidence_span: TSMC describes CoWoS-S as packaging for ultra-high-performance computing, AI, and supercomputing with HBM cubes and large interposers.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: 3dfabric.tsmc.com
source_url: https://3dfabric.tsmc.com/english/dedicatedFoundry/technology/cowos.htm

claim: Hyperscaler capex has risen sharply and may pressure free cash flow; a social post cites a Nomura-style chart claiming FCF for AMZN/MSFT/GOOG/META/ORCL is nearing zero while S&P 500 is at highs.
evidence_span: Alphabet expected 2026 capex in the $175B-$185B range and said investments are for AI compute, Cloud demand, Services, and Other Bets.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: abc.xyz
source_url: https://abc.xyz/investor/events/event-details/2026/2025-Q4-Earnings-Call-2026-Dr_C033hS6/default.aspx

claim: Morgan Stanley was early to call a storage supercycle and remains a persistent NVIDIA bull; a newer report also highlights MLCC.
evidence_span: KLA describes AI-chip manufacturing as requiring advanced process control across memory, logic, and packaging.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: kla.com
source_url: https://www.kla.com/advance/innovation/klas-process-control-solutions-are-shaping-the-future-of-ai

claim: Physical AI is a major future theme across robotics, autonomous systems, low-altitude economy, and AI hardware infrastructure.
evidence_span: NVIDIA announced Cosmos world models, Isaac simulation frameworks, and Isaac GR00T models to accelerate robotics and physical AI.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: investor.nvidia.com
source_url: https://investor.nvidia.com/news/press-release-details/2026/NVIDIA-and-Global-Robotics-Leaders-Take-Physical-AI-to-the-Real-World/

claim: Physical AI is a major future theme across robotics, autonomous systems, low-altitude economy, and AI hardware infrastructure.
evidence_span: NVIDIA describes Isaac GR00T as a research initiative and development platform for robot foundation models and data pipelines.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: developer.nvidia.com
source_url: https://developer.nvidia.com/isaac/gr00t

claim: The ZhuLinsen daily_stock_analysis GitHub project is an AI-driven A/HK/US/JP/KR stock watchlist analysis system that can produce daily dashboards and push reports.
evidence_span: The English README says the system analyzes watchlists daily, generates a decision dashboard, and pushes to Telegram/Discord/Slack/Email/WeChat Work/Feishu.
source_class: official_project_repo
source_domain: github.com
source_url: https://github.com/ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis/blob/main/docs/README_EN.md

claim: The ZhuLinsen daily_stock_analysis GitHub project is an AI-driven A/HK/US/JP/KR stock watchlist analysis system that can produce daily dashboards and push reports.
evidence_span: The project site says DSA integrates market data, news sentiment, technicals, fundamentals, and LLMs for individual-stock reports and market recaps.
source_class: official_project_site
source_domain: dsa.zhulinsen.tech
source_url: https://dsa.zhulinsen.tech/

claim: A seven-stock European photonics basket maps to CPO, InP lasers, silicon photonics, glass processing, and AI data-center optical interconnect themes; the stock basket itself is implied to be investable.
evidence_span: Roundhill Memory ETF packages exposure to global memory companies and began trading in April 2026.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: roundhillinvestments.com
source_url: https://www.roundhillinvestments.com/etf/dram/

claim: Micron had very strong fiscal Q3 2026 results, AI/data-center memory demand is structurally strong, and automotive/robotics/autonomous systems can support longer-term memory demand.
evidence_span: Roundhill lists memory-related holdings including SK hynix and SanDisk on the DRAM ETF page.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: roundhillinvestments.com
source_url: https://www.roundhillinvestments.com/etf/dram/

claim: Micron had very strong fiscal Q3 2026 results, AI/data-center memory demand is structurally strong, and automotive/robotics/autonomous systems can support longer-term memory demand.
evidence_span: MarketWatch describes the Roundhill Memory ETF as recently launched and notes rapid gains and volatility in the memory-chip sector.
source_class: auditable_secondary
source_domain: marketwatch.com
source_url: https://www.marketwatch.com/livecoverage/stock-market-today-dow-s-p-500-nasdaq-tech-sell-off-oil-prices-us-waiving-oil-sanctions-iran/card/why-this-red-hot-etf-has-wall-street-worried-about-big-swings-in-the-memory-chip-sector-WtBf3NlDs1VkTYKJ7sjs

claim: A broad AI supply-chain basket across semis, memory, optics, data centers, and energy contains the next tenbagger candidates.
evidence_span: KLA explains that advanced AI chips require precise process control across logic, memory, and packaging steps.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: kla.com
source_url: https://www.kla.com/advance/innovation/klas-process-control-solutions-are-shaping-the-future-of-ai

claim: AI compute hardware bottlenecks are moving into low-loss materials, orthogonal backplanes, glass substrates, and CPO; this creates a structural investment window.
evidence_span: Micron says DRAM/NAND demand significantly exceeds supply, supporting memory as an infrastructure bottleneck.
source_class: primary_official
source_domain: investors.micron.com
source_url: https://investors.micron.com/static-files/631b1a32-5537-46ae-8f40-82e42fc79dfe

claim: Optical-module earnings are certain while the semiconductor cycle has only just started.
evidence_span: SEC investor resources warn that stock recommendations may be promoted through social media and should not be used alone for investment decisions.
source_class: regulatory_warning
source_domain: investor.gov
source_url: https://www.investor.gov/introduction-investing/general-resources/news-alerts/alerts-bulletins

claim: A basket including MU, RKLB, NBIS, MRVL, INTC, NVDA, CRWV and others is claimed to be safe/long-term and “cannot lose money” if held.
evidence_span: No official source in this pilot verifies the quality, identity, or track record of the recommended bloggers.
source_class: none
